pkgmetadata.longdescription: As of 2026-04-22 this package is not installable from the stuff overlay. Its hard RDEPEND on sci-physics/ifeffit is masked in profiles/package.mask because upstream ifeffit (github.com/newville/ifeffit) was deleted. Kept in the tree in case ifeffit is revived or demeter is ported to use sci-physics/xraylarch (Larch), the maintained modern successor that is already packaged in this overlay.
